rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Trustee Petition Of March 31, 2016 For Delay In Prosecution; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Dismiss Trustee Petition of March 31, 2016 for Delay in Prosecution is denied. The Court declines to exercise its discretion to dismiss this petition for not having been brought to trial within two years because, among other reasons, the law prefers resolution on the merits, many of the same issues would still need to be addressed in resolving the moving party's petitions (which she is not offering to dismiss), and moving party herself shares substantial responsibility for the delay in bringing this petition to conclusion. The Court expects the parties to participate without pre-condition in the previously ordered mediation, which the Court understands is scheduled for February 21, 2019. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise opposing parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, February 19, 2019.
